summary: The CI failed because a doctest in the documentation (doc/callbacks.rst) failed, causing the pytest job to report one failing test.

suggested_fix: Open doc/callbacks.rst and inspect the doctest at line 48; update the example or its expected output so it matches actual behavior, then re-run the doctests (e.g. pytest ../doc/callbacks.rst::callbacks.rst) to verify the fix.
